items.title: Foundational Stage
items.description: Language readiness, numeracy, rhymes, art, activity-based learning, motor skills, and healthy routines.
items.alt: Young Indian school children in classroom

items.title: Primary School
items.description: Strong reading, writing, mathematics, EVS, languages, art, general knowledge, and classroom confidence.

items.title: Middle School
items.description: Subject foundations in science, mathematics, social science, languages, computer education, and project work.

items.title: Secondary & Senior Secondary
items.description: Board-exam preparation, practicals, counselling, academic planning, career awareness, and stream readiness.
